basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Neuropsychologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) Neuropsychologist Notification 2026 has been released on the official AIIMS Bhubaneswar website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Neuropsychologist Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 45 years of age who have an M.Phil or Ph.D. in Clinical Psychology are eligible to apply for this Neuropsychologist vacancy. The application process via email will remain open until 13-06-2026, with the walk-in scheduled for 15-06-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and access appli

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation admissible for SC/ST/OBC, Retrenched Government Employees, Departmental candidates and Ex-servicemen as per Central Government instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Phil/ Ph. D in clinical Psychology
qualification.details: M. Phil/ Ph. D in clinical Psychology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Neuropsychologist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Neuropsychologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Neuropsychologist position is 13th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Neuropsychologist post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Neuropsychologist role, candidates must possess an M. Phil or Ph. D in Clinical Psychology. This is the primary academic requirement for the position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Neuropsychologist post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Neuropsychologist position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Neuropsychologist post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 47,200 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Neuropsychologist job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the designated email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Neuropsychologist role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Neuropsychologist position at AIIMS Bhubaneswar will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Neuropsychologist announced by AIIMS Bhubaneswar in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Bhubaneswar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bhubaneswar is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 751019.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Neuropsychologist position at AIIMS Bhubaneswar is a contractual job. The duration and terms of the contract will be as per the institute's policy.
